free_text: Investigation of nuclear fusion in reactions of
Two pairs of silicon surface barrier detectors
surrounded the targets. The detectors had rather big
diameters (~ 5 cm) and were placed at a distance of
Two targets with the thickness of ~ 300 mu-g/cm2 were
placed at an angle of 45 degr. to the beam axis.
error definition was changed. Data in Sub 003 were
re-digitized. In Sub 021 REACTION code was changed.
given only for comparison, experimental data from
this article are presented at Subents 002-004).
